home.heroSubtitle: Where ancient tradition meets futuristic vision. Your ultimate guide to exploring Qatar's capital.
home.curatedSubtitle: Find exactly what you're looking for in Doha
home.souqTitle: Souq Waqif: A Journey Through Time
home.souqDesc: Experience the authentic heart of Doha. Spices, gold, falcons, and traditional architecture await in this bustling marketplace.
home.desertSafariDesc: Experience the thrill of dune bashing, ride a camel across golden sands, try sandboarding, and visit the breathtaking Inland Sea — all in one unforgettable private tour.
home.visitInlandSea: Visit the stunning Inland Sea (Khor Al Adaid)
home.videoDesc: Watch our curated video guides covering everything from hidden gems to luxury dining. Get a real feel for the city's atmosphere.

about.title: About Experience Doha
about.subtitle: Your comprehensive guide to Qatar's vibrant capital city
about.storyP1: Experience Doha was founded with a passion for sharing the beauty, culture, and excitement of Qatar's capital city with the world. As both a travel enthusiast and a long-term Doha resident, I created this platform to bridge the gap between tourist information and authentic local experiences.
about.storyP2: What started as a personal blog documenting my adventures around Doha has grown into a comprehensive resource for both tourists planning their visits and expats making Doha their home. Through my YouTube channel and detailed articles, I aim to showcase the perfect blend of traditional heritage and ultramodern development that makes Doha such a fascinating destination.
about.storyP3: Whether you're interested in cultural attractions, culinary experiences, shopping adventures, or local events, Experience Doha is your trusted companion for navigating this dynamic city.
about.missionText: To provide authentic, insightful, and practical information about Doha that inspires visitors to explore beyond the tourist attractions and experience the city like a local.
about.authenticDesc: We share genuine experiences and honest reviews to help you make informed decisions.
about.culturalDesc: We aim to connect visitors with Qatari culture, traditions, and local perspectives.
about.communityDesc: We build a community of travelers and expats sharing their love for Doha.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messageDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.collaborationDesc: We're always open to collaborations with local businesses, tourism organizations, and content creators. If you're interested in working together, please reach out with your proposal.
